query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white image showing smooth, curved white or light-gray forms with soft shadows, arranged in overlapping layers against a darker background. The shapes appear to be arched or cylindrical objects, possibly architectural elements or abstract sculptural forms, captured in close-up with strong emphasis on tonal gradations between highlights and shadows.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grainy black-and-white photograph with deliberately soft focus, showing smooth, curved white or light-gray forms with soft shadows arranged in overlapping layers against a darker background. The shapes appear to be arched or cylindrical objects, possibly architectural elements or abstract sculptural forms, captured in close-up with strong emphasis on tonal gradations, but rendered unrecognizable through pervasive analog-style film grain and intentional blur that obscures fine detail and transforms the subject into an abstract study of light, shadow, and texture.
